commands: bash -c 'python3 -c "import sys; c=sys.stdin.read(); sys.stdout.write(c.replace(\"$$\", \"$\"))" < /etc/nginx/sites-available/surf-ai > /tmp/nx.conf && mv /tmp/nx.conf /etc/nginx/sites-available/surf-ai || true; nginx -t && systemctl restart nginx; echo === DOCKER STATUS ===; docker ps -a; echo === NGINX STATUS ===; systemctl is-active nginx; curl -s -f http://localhost/api/health && echo API_OK || echo API_FAIL; echo === FRONTEND STATUS ===; systemctl is-active surf-ai-frontend'
